## Type of change

- [ ] Content — new or updated cheat sheet item / example / glossary term
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number, if applicable -->

## For content PRs

- [ ] Added/edited in `content/cheatsheet.json` (or `glossary.json` / `decisions.json`)
- [ ] Verified the item renders correctly in the browser
- [ ] Checked level assignment (beginner / mid / pro) is appropriate
- [ ] Source for the information: <!-- link to official docs, release notes, etc. -->

## For UI/code PRs

- [ ] Tested in light mode and dark mode
- [ ] Tested at 1, 2, and 3 column layouts (Settings → Columns)
- [ ] No new dependencies added (CDN-only rule unless discussed)
